title: Hunter Biden’s criminal trials near as president preps for a busy June

title: Voters weigh women celebs' shot at the polls
shortDescription: Although some high-profile men have made the transition from stardom to politician, no woman has yet. We polled voters to ask who they might support.

title: Key Trump trial players win Georgia primaries
shortDescription: Fulton Co. District Attorney Fani Willis and Fulton Co. Judge Scott McAfee both won their Georgia primary races.

title: All South Dakota tribes vote to banish Gov. Kristi Noem from reservation
shortDescription: Flandreau Santee Sioux Tribe voted to formally banish South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem from their lands because of disparaging remarks.

title: False claim Biden canceled debates with Trump in May 2024 | Fact check
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump are scheduled for two debates this year. Biden did not pull out of the debates.

title: Giuliani pleads not guilty in AZ election case
shortDescription: Former Donald Trump campaign lawyer Rudy Giuliani appeared remotely in Arizona court to plead not guilty in the 2020 election case.

title: OnPolitics: Trump and Biden's debate is in Georgia. What to know
shortDescription: The first presidential debate will take place in Atlanta, Georgia. Its location has a history for Trump.

title: Doctored image of Trump crowd didn't come from Trump | Fact check
shortDescription: The altered image was first shared as satire by an account with no affiliation to Trump. There is no record of the former president sharing it.

title: Schumer in talks with Johnson to invite Netanyahu to speak to Congress

shortDescription: Usually in lockstep with President Joe Biden, Sen. Bernie Sanders voices support for the ICC's request for arrest warrant of Israel's PM Netanyahu

title: Trump denies support for contraception bans; Biden allies disagree

shortDescription: Sen. John Fetterman and other lawmakers criticized the justice for his controversial upside-down flag and called for him to recuse himself from pivotal cases.

title: Door knocking in the heat: What it's like registering NC Latino voters
